info.arTaH: varRe samparcane avayave avyakte Sabde ca
info.english_meaning: to color to paint to make shine to murmur
info.hindI_arTa: raMganA camakIlA karanA DuMDuruoMkA Sabda honA wukaq0e wukaq0e karanA aspazwa Sabda honA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: yaTAyaTaM sakarmakaH akarmakaH ca  ' samparcane ityeke  avayave ityapare  avyakte Sabde itItare ' iti kOmudI   ' varRe piNkte Bavet piYjerBAzArTe piYjayediti ' (Slo. 60) iti devaH
